title: After the Japanese Derby: Standing Tall

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe dominates at the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her win comes at the cost of great stress on
her body. Agnes Tachyon and I spare no effort in
nursing her back to health...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Managing to prevent Manhattan Cafe from
suffering any serious issues, we hold out hope for
the autumn season.
